name: Pumpkin Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large stainless-steel bowl over a hot-water bath, combine pumpkin, sour cream, cream cheese, 1 cup sugar, salt, pumpkin pie spice, and ground ginger.
2. Heat water to boiling, beating mixture with hand-held mixer until ingredients are fluffy.
3. Add egg yolks and beat for 3 minutes.
4. Remove mixture from heat and refrigerate for 10 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, whip the remaining whipping cream with 2 tablespoons sugar.
6. Gently fold the whipped cream into the chilled pumpkin mixture.
7. Carefully fold in the egg whites until just combined.
8. Chill the mousse for 4-6 hours.
9. Top each serving with the reserved whipped cream and finely chopped crystallized ginger.
Serves 4 to 6
